economic-dispatch.note: within-limits criterion has a broken testPattern regex that never matches the test name, making 80 the maximum possible score

changes_made.description: Rewrote skill to be directive for small models: added CRITICAL RULES section emphasizing writing Python scripts (not mental computation), string content for write_file, and complete copy-paste Python script templates for both tasks. Fixed slack generation formula (total_load - other_gen, not vice versa).

Added per-unit conversion (S_base=100) to DC power flow script to fix unreasonably large angles. Made generator dispatch setting more explicit with hardcoded example values. Added assertions to economic dispatch script for self-verification. Increased iteration count to 500.
